  • src.crud.formula

Source code for src.crud.formula

from sqlalchemy import func
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session, joinedload

from src.models.formula import Formula, FormulaItem, FormulaVisit
from src.models.inventory import InventoryItem, InventoryTxn
from src.models.tenant_product import TenantProduct
from src.schemas.formula import FormulaCreate, FormulaUpdate, FormulaVisitCreate




[docs]
class InsufficientInventoryError(Exception):
    """Raised when there is insufficient inventory to create a formula."""
    def __init__(self, insufficient_items: list[dict]):
        self.insufficient_items = insufficient_items
        super().__init__(f"Insufficient inventory: {len(insufficient_items)} item(s)")






[docs]
def get_formula(db: Session, formula_id: str) -> Formula | None:
    return (
        db.query(Formula)
        .options(joinedload(Formula.formula_items), joinedload(Formula.visit))
        .filter(Formula.id == formula_id)
        .first()
    )






[docs]
def get_formula_visit(db: Session, visit_id: str) -> FormulaVisit | None:
    return (
        db.query(FormulaVisit)
        .options(joinedload(FormulaVisit.formulas).joinedload(Formula.formula_items))
        .filter(FormulaVisit.id == visit_id)
        .first()
    )




def _validate_inventory_for_items(
    db: Session,
    location_id: str,
    items: list,
) -> list[dict]:
    """Return insufficient inventory details for a flat list of formula items."""
    insufficient_items: list[dict] = []
    for item_data in items:
        tenant_product = (
            db.query(TenantProduct)
            .options(joinedload(TenantProduct.product))
            .filter(TenantProduct.id == item_data.tenant_product_id)
            .first()
        )
        if tenant_product:
            product_name = tenant_product.custom_name or (
                tenant_product.product.name if tenant_product.product else "Unknown Product"
            )
            tracking_unit = tenant_product.tracking_unit
        else:
            product_name = "Unknown Product"
            tracking_unit = "units"

        inv_item = (
            db.query(InventoryItem)
            .filter(
                InventoryItem.location_id == location_id,
                InventoryItem.tenant_product_id == item_data.tenant_product_id,
            )
            .first()
        )
        if not inv_item:
            insufficient_items.append({
                "tenant_product_id": item_data.tenant_product_id,
                "product_name": product_name,
                "tracking_unit": tracking_unit,
                "amount_needed": item_data.amount_used,
                "available": 0.0,
                "reason": "Inventory item not found for this location",
            })
        else:
            available = float(inv_item.on_hand_qty)
            needed = item_data.amount_used
            if available < needed:
                insufficient_items.append({
                    "tenant_product_id": item_data.tenant_product_id,
                    "product_name": product_name,
                    "tracking_unit": tracking_unit,
                    "amount_needed": needed,
                    "available": available,
                    "reason": (
                        f"Insufficient inventory. Need {needed} {tracking_unit}, "
                        f"have {available} {tracking_unit}"
                    ),
                })
    return insufficient_items


def _apply_formula_items(
    db: Session,
    *,
    tenant_id: str,
    location_id: str,
    formula_id: str,
    user_id: str,
    items: list,
) -> None:
    for item_data in items:
        formula_item = FormulaItem(
            formula_id=formula_id,
            tenant_product_id=item_data.tenant_product_id,
            amount_used=item_data.amount_used,
            waste_amount=item_data.waste_amount,
            cost_at_time=item_data.cost_at_time,
        )
        db.add(formula_item)

        inv_item = (
            db.query(InventoryItem)
            .filter(
                InventoryItem.location_id == location_id,
                InventoryItem.tenant_product_id == item_data.tenant_product_id,
            )
            .first()
        )
        if inv_item:
            inv_item.on_hand_qty = float(inv_item.on_hand_qty) - item_data.amount_used
            txn = InventoryTxn(
                tenant_id=tenant_id,
                inventory_item_id=inv_item.id,
                formula_id=formula_id,
                user_id=user_id,
                txn_type="CONSUME",
                qty_delta=-item_data.amount_used,
                unit_cost_at_time=item_data.cost_at_time,
            )
            db.add(txn)




[docs]
def get_formulas_by_customer(
    db: Session,
    tenant_id: str,
    customer_id: str,
    location_id: str | None = None,
    skip: int = 0,
    limit: int = 50,
) -> list[Formula]:
    query = (
        db.query(Formula)
        .options(joinedload(Formula.formula_items), joinedload(Formula.visit))
        .filter(Formula.tenant_id == tenant_id, Formula.customer_id == customer_id)
    )
    if location_id:
        query = query.filter(Formula.location_id == location_id)
    return query.order_by(Formula.created_at.desc()).offset(skip).limit(limit).all()






[docs]
def get_formulas_by_tenant(
    db: Session,
    tenant_id: str,
    location_id: str | None = None,
    skip: int = 0,
    limit: int = 100,
) -> list[Formula]:
    query = db.query(Formula).options(joinedload(Formula.formula_items), joinedload(Formula.visit)).filter(Formula.tenant_id == tenant_id)
    if location_id:
        query = query.filter(Formula.location_id == location_id)
    return query.order_by(Formula.created_at.desc()).offset(skip).limit(limit).all()






[docs]
def create_formula(db: Session, data: FormulaCreate) -> Formula:
    """
    Create a formula with its items and automatically:
    1. Validate sufficient inventory for all items
    2. Record inventory CONSUME transactions for each product used.
    3. Deduct stock from inventory_items.

    Raises InsufficientInventoryError if insufficient inventory.
    """
    insufficient_items = _validate_inventory_for_items(db, data.location_id, data.items)
    if insufficient_items:
        raise InsufficientInventoryError(insufficient_items)

    formula_data = data.model_dump(exclude={"items"})
    formula = Formula(**formula_data)
    db.add(formula)
    db.flush()

    _apply_formula_items(
        db,
        tenant_id=data.tenant_id,
        location_id=data.location_id,
        formula_id=formula.id,
        user_id=data.created_by_user_id,
        items=data.items,
    )

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(formula)
    return formula






[docs]
def create_formula_visit(db: Session, data: FormulaVisitCreate) -> FormulaVisit:
    """
    Create one visit ticket with multiple labeled bowls (formulas) atomically.
    Validates inventory for all bowls before deducting anything.
    """
    if not data.bowls:
        raise ValueError("At least one bowl is required.")

    non_empty_bowls = [bowl for bowl in data.bowls if bowl.items]
    if not non_empty_bowls:
        raise ValueError("At least one bowl must contain products.")

    all_items = [item for bowl in non_empty_bowls for item in bowl.items]
    insufficient_items = _validate_inventory_for_items(db, data.location_id, all_items)
    if insufficient_items:
        raise InsufficientInventoryError(insufficient_items)

    visit = FormulaVisit(
        tenant_id=data.tenant_id,
        location_id=data.location_id,
        customer_id=data.customer_id,
        created_by_user_id=data.created_by_user_id,
        session_name=data.session_name,
        service_type=data.service_type,
        notes=data.notes,
    )
    db.add(visit)
    db.flush()

    for bowl in non_empty_bowls:
        bowl_label = (bowl.bowl_label or "").strip() or None
        formula_name = bowl_label
        if data.session_name and bowl_label:
            formula_name = f"{data.session_name} — {bowl_label}"
        elif data.session_name:
            formula_name = data.session_name

        formula = Formula(
            tenant_id=data.tenant_id,
            location_id=data.location_id,
            customer_id=data.customer_id,
            created_by_user_id=data.created_by_user_id,
            visit_id=visit.id,
            bowl_label=bowl_label,
            bowl_sort_order=bowl.bowl_sort_order,
            formula_name=formula_name,
            service_type=data.service_type,
            notes=bowl.notes,
        )
        db.add(formula)
        db.flush()

        _apply_formula_items(
            db,
            tenant_id=data.tenant_id,
            location_id=data.location_id,
            formula_id=formula.id,
            user_id=data.created_by_user_id,
            items=bowl.items,
        )

    db.commit()
    visit = get_formula_visit(db, visit.id)
    assert visit is not None
    visit.formulas.sort(key=lambda f: (f.bowl_sort_order or 0, f.created_at))
    return visit






[docs]
def update_formula(db: Session, formula_id: str, data: FormulaUpdate) -> Formula | None:
    formula = db.query(Formula).filter(Formula.id == formula_id).first()
    if not formula:
        return None
    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_none=True).items():
        setattr(formula, field, value)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(formula)
    return formula






[docs]
def delete_formula(db: Session, formula_id: str) -> bool:
    formula = db.query(Formula).filter(Formula.id == formula_id).first()
    if not formula:
        return False
    db.delete(formula)
    db.commit()
    return True






[docs]
def count_formulas_by_customer(
    db: Session, tenant_id: str, customer_id: str, location_id: str | None = None
) -> int:
    query = db.query(func.count(Formula.id)).filter(
        Formula.tenant_id == tenant_id, Formula.customer_id == customer_id
    )
    if location_id:
        query = query.filter(Formula.location_id == location_id)
    return query.scalar() or 0






[docs]
def count_formulas_by_tenant(
    db: Session, tenant_id: str, location_id: str | None = None
) -> int:
    query = db.query(func.count(Formula.id)).filter(Formula.tenant_id == tenant_id)
    if location_id:
        query = query.filter(Formula.location_id == location_id)
    return query.scalar() or 0
